phases.title: Hangar Floor, Cibubur
phases.body: Internship at a helicopter MRO shop, hands on Bell, Sikorsky, and Airbus airframes. Before any of the code, this is where the discipline started.

phases.title: Into Web3, Straight to Lead
phases.body: Entered crypto through an Optimism airdrop and quickly stepped into a community lead role at Vitall on Solana. No slow ramp.

phases.title: Learning the Craft
phases.body: Testnets, governance, wallet security, and my first attempts at running validators. Plenty of failure, but the fundamentals stuck.

phases.title: Aptos Validator
phases.body: Stood up an Aptos validator through a quiet bear market and earned the reward. Reinvested it into running more nodes and retroactive farming.

phases.title: Airdrop Season
phases.body: Qualified for major airdrops across the ecosystem. The strongest run of the journey, built on years of groundwork.

phases.title: A Hard Security Lesson
phases.body: Lost funds to an approval-phishing signature. It reshaped how I treat every transaction and pulled me toward security for good.

phases.title: Security & AI Agents
phases.body: Pivoted hard into bug bounty and building AI agents that automate Web3 work. The fastest I have ever learned, and the heading I am committed to.
